body: The president's remarks come as global oil prices have fallen but remain higher than before the US-Israel war with Iran. Meanwhile, the average price of regular gasoline in the US has fallen to about $3.93 a gallon after topping $4 a gallon in April, its highest since 2022, but is still well above pre-war levels.
